articles.title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
articles.description: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".
articles.titleJa: 米国のテロ対策トップ、イラン戦争を巡り辞任、トランプ氏に「方針転換」を促す
articles.summary: 米国の対テロセンター長がイラン戦争を巡り辞任し、トランプ大統領に戦争方針の転換を求めた。イスラエルやロビー団体の圧力で戦争が始まったと述べている。

articles.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
articles.description: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
articles.titleJa: カブールのリハビリ施設が空爆され、患者らが夕食中に被弾したと生存者がBBCに語る
articles.summary: カブールのリハビリ施設がパキスタン軍の空爆を受け、患者らが夕食中に犠牲になったと生存者が証言。死者数は数百人に上ると懸念されている。

articles.title: Israel says it killed Iranian security chief Ali Larijani in air strike
articles.description: The deaths of Larijani and the head of the paramilitary Basij force have not been confirmed by Iranian authorities.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル、空爆でイラン治安トップのアリ・ラリジャニ氏を殺害と発表
articles.summary: イスラエルが空爆でイランの治安部門トップであるアリ・ラリジャニ氏を殺害したと発表。イラン当局は彼の死を確認していない。

articles.title: Pakistan air strike kills at least 100 at Kabul drug rehab centre
articles.description: Some of the bodies were injured beyond recognition, forensic laboratory sources told the BBC.
articles.titleJa: パキスタン空爆、カブールの薬物更生施設で少なくとも100人死亡
articles.summary: パキスタン軍による空爆がカブールの薬物更生施設を直撃し、少なくとも100人が死亡。遺体の一部は身元不明の状態であると報じられている。

articles.title: Chile's president begins building border barrier less than week into term
articles.description: José Antonio Kast visited the ditch - a few feet wide and deep - on Monday, calling it a "milestone".
articles.titleJa: チリ大統領、就任1週間足らずで国境障壁の建設を開始
articles.summary: チリのホセ・アントニオ・カスト大統領が、就任後1週間足らずで国境の溝の建設を開始し、これを「画期的な出来事」と称した。

articles.title: Utah mother who wrote book about grief found guilty of poisoning husband
articles.description: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.
articles.titleJa: 悲嘆に関する本を執筆したユタ州の母親、夫殺害の罪で有罪判決
articles.summary: ユタ州のコウリ・リッチンス氏が、2022年3月に夫をフェンタニル入りの飲み物で毒殺した罪で有罪判決を受けた。

articles.title: Water supply cut in Moldova after oil spill blamed on Russian strike in Ukraine
articles.description: Moldova has imposed a 15-day state of alert in the Dniester river basin as a precaution.
articles.titleJa: モルドバで給水停止、ウクライナでのロシア軍攻撃による石油流出が原因か
articles.summary: ウクライナでのロシア軍の攻撃による石油流出が原因で、モルドバで給水が停止された。モルドバはドニエストル川流域に15日間の警戒態勢を敷いている。

articles.title: Aspiring female Zambian politicians were asked for sexual favours, official says
articles.description: These reports harm attempts to close the wide gender representation gap in Zambia, activists say.
articles.titleJa: 志望するザンビアの女性政治家、性的便宜を要求されると当局者が明かす
articles.summary: ザンビアで政治家を目指す女性が性的便宜を求められる事例が報告された。これはジェンダー代表の格差を解消しようとする試みを阻害すると活動家は指摘している。

articles.title: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia
articles.description: The National Center for Learning Disabilities said it was "disturbed" by the president's remarks.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、ニューサム氏の失読症を嘲笑し「大統領は学習障害を持つべきではない」と発言
articles.summary: トランプ氏がカリフォルニア州知事のニューサム氏の失読症を嘲笑し、「大統領は学習障害を持つべきではない」と発言。全米学習障害センターはこれに「動揺している」と述べた。

articles.title: And the burger goes to... Michael B Jordan marks Oscars win at In-N-Out
articles.description: Hours after winning best actor, Jordan joins an exclusive list of famous faces to celebrate an Oscar victory with a burger.
articles.titleJa: バーガーは君に… マイケル・B・ジョーダン、オスカー受賞をイン・N・アウトで祝う
articles.summary: 映画『クリード』などで知られるマイケル・B・ジョーダンが、主演男優賞を受賞後、イン・N・アウトバーガーでオスカーの喜びを祝った。

articles.title: War in Iran: Chronically ill fight for survival
articles.description: As a consequence of the US-Israeli war against Iran, a new humanitarian crisis is looming. Millions of chronically ill people in Iran are at risk of losing access to medical care.
articles.titleJa: イランでの戦争：慢性疾患患者が生き残りをかけて闘う
articles.summary: 米国とイスラエルのイランに対する戦争の結果、新たな人道危機が迫っている。イランでは数百万人の慢性疾患患者が医療を受けられなくなる危険性がある。

articles.title: Belgian diplomat faces trial over 1961 DR Congo leader killing
articles.description: Etienne Davignon, the only surviving suspect, is ordered to stand trial over war crimes tied to Patrice Lumumba's killing six decades ago. The case represents a historic moment in confronting Belgium's colonial past.
articles.titleJa: ベルギー外交官、1961年のDRコンゴ指導者殺害で裁判に直面
articles.summary: ベルギーの外交官が、60年前のパトリス・ルムンバ殺害に関連する戦争犯罪で裁判を受ける。これはベルギーの植民地時代の過去と向き合う歴史的な瞬間となる。

articles.title: Is Iran's regime at a breaking point?
articles.description: Eighteen days into the conflict, Iran's Revolutionary Guards remain active despite major setbacks. Their flexible command structure sustains operations, yet analysts see signs of pressure within the power system.
articles.titleJa: イラン政権は転換点にあるのか？
articles.summary: 紛争開始から18日、イランの革命防衛隊は後退にもかかわらず活動を続ける。柔軟な指揮系統が作戦を維持するが、アナリストは権力システム内部に圧力を示す兆候を見ている。

articles.title: Vatican declares partial mistrial in cardinal's fraud case
articles.description: A Vatican appeals court overturned the conviction in a landmark fraud case involving a senior Catholic cardinal. Angelo Becciu is appealing a five-and-a-half year jail term.
articles.titleJa: バチカン、枢機卿の詐欺事件で一部無効を宣言
articles.summary: バチカン控訴裁判所は、上級カトリック枢機卿が関与した詐欺事件での有罪判決を覆した。アンジェロ・ベッチウは5年半の懲役刑を控訴中である。

articles.title: Starmer urges allies to keep focus on Ukraine amid Iran war
articles.description: The British leader urged allies to stay focused on Ukraine as he met Volodymyr Zelenskyy in London and announced a new defense partnership, including UK support for an AI center in Kyiv.
articles.titleJa: スターマー、イラン戦争の中、ウクライナへの注力を同盟国に促す
articles.summary: 英国の指導者がロンドンでゼレンスキー大統領と会談し、ウクライナへの注力を同盟国に促した。英国はキーウでのAIセンター支援を含む新たな防衛パートナーシップを発表した。

articles.title: Nigeria tightens security in Maiduguri after suicide attacks
articles.description: President Bola Tinubu has ordered security chiefs to relocate to Maiduguri, following Monday's suicide bombings that left at least 23 people dead. Authorities suspect Boko Haram militants as being behind the attacks.
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリア、自爆攻撃後にマイヅグリで警備強化
articles.summary: ボラ・ティヌブ大統領は、月曜日の自爆テロで23人が死亡したことを受け、治安当局幹部にマイヅグリへの異動を命じた。当局はボコ・ハラムの犯行を疑っている。

articles.title: Iran war: NATO making 'mistake' on Hormuz, Trump says
articles.description: Donald Trump said NATO is making a "very foolish mistake" by not helping to escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, US national counterterrorism center chief stepped down over the Iran war. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: イラン戦争：NATOはホルムズ海峡で「間違い」を犯しているとトランプ氏
articles.summary: ドナルド・トランプ氏は、NATOがホルムズ海峡でのタンカー護衛に協力しないことは「愚かな間違い」だと述べた。一方、米国の国家対テロセンター長がイラン戦争を理由に辞任した。

articles.title: Iran war overlaps with Afghanistan-Pakistan conflict
articles.description: With airstrikes on Afghan territory, including the strategically important Bagram Airfield, Pakistan has declared open war on the Taliban. This escalation coincides with the war in Iran.
articles.titleJa: イラン戦争とアフガニスタン・パキスタン紛争が重なる
articles.summary: パキスタンは、戦略的に重要なバグラム空軍基地を含むアフガニスタン領土への空爆を行い、タリバンに対し開戦を宣言した。このエスカレーションはイラン戦争と時期が重なる。

articles.title: Northern Ireland's Gerry Adams tells court he wasn't in IRA
articles.description: The former leader of Sinn Fein is accused in London's High Court of being responsible for Irish Republican Army (IRA) attacks in England. But Gerry Adams said he was never a member, instead calling them his "neighbors."
articles.titleJa: 北アイルランドのジェリー・アダムス、IRAメンバーではないと法廷で証言
articles.summary: シン・フェイン党の元党首ジェリー・アダムスは、ロンドンの高等裁判所でアイルランド共和軍（IRA）によるイングランドでの攻撃の責任を問われているが、自身はメンバーではなかったと証言した。

articles.title: The German village running on its own juice
articles.description: While war in the Middle East sends oil prices soaring and households brace for higher bills, one tiny German village has spent 30 years making itself immune to exactly this kind of shock.
articles.titleJa: 自給自足で稼働するドイツの村
articles.summary: 中東での戦争が原油価格を高騰させ、家計が値上げに備える中、あるドイツの小さな村は30年間かけて、このような衝撃に影響されない体質を作り上げてきた。

articles.title: Belgian court sends ex-diplomat, 93, to trial over 1961 murder of Congo leader
articles.description:
Family of then PM, Patrice Lumumba, welcome decision to charge Étienne Davignon as ‘beginning of a reckoning’ 
A former Belgian diplomat, 93, should stand trial over alleged complicity in the 1961 murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of what was then the newly independent Congolese state, a Brussels court has ruled.
Étienne Davignon, the only person still alive among 10 Belgians the Lumumba family accuses of involvement in the killing, is charged with participation in war crimes.
The illegal transfer of Lumumba and his associates from Léopoldville (now Kinshasa) to Katanga.
The “humiliating and degrading treatment” of the men.
Depriving them of a fair trial.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ベルギーの裁判所、93歳の元外交官を1961年のコンゴ指導者殺害で裁判へ
articles.summary: ベルギーの裁判所が、1961年のコンゴ初代首相パトリス・ルムンバ殺害への関与で93歳の元外交官の公判を決定。ルムンバの家族はこの決定を「清算の始まり」と歓迎している。

articles.title: At least 23 people killed in suspected suicide attacks in north-eastern Nigeria
articles.description:
More than 100 others injured in bombings targeting post office, market areas and hospital in Maiduguri
At least 23 people have been killed and more than 100 others injured in multiple suspected suicide bombings in the north-eastern Nigerian city of Maiduguri, shattering its reputation as a relative oasis of calm in recent years as a long-running insurgency was pushed to the rural hinterlands.
Authorities said the explosions went off at the post office and market areas, as well as the entrance to the University of Maiduguri teaching hospital, on Monday evening during iftar, the breaking of fast in the month of Ramadan.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリア北東部で自爆テロとみられる攻撃により少なくとも23人が死亡
articles.summary: ナイジェリア北東部のマイヅグリで複数の自爆テロとみられる攻撃があり、少なくとも23人が死亡、100人以上が負傷。比較的平穏だった地域の治安が悪化している。

articles.title: ‘These connections are overlooked’: how British companies profited from slavery in Brazil long after abolition
articles.description:
Britons learn about the country’s involvement ‘almost as a self-congratulatory narrative’, says historian Joseph Mulhern 
In 1845 British citizens and companies were already legally prohibited from owning or buying enslaved people overseas, yet that year 385 captives were “transferred” to a British mining company in Brazil named St John d’El Rey.
Despite a global campaign waged by the UK against slavery and the transatlantic slave trade, the move was not technically illegal because the enslaved people were not sold but “rented” – a practice permitted overseas under the 1843 Slave Trade Act.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「これらのつながりは見過ごされている」：英国企業がいかに廃止後もブラジルの奴隷制度から利益を得たか
articles.summary: 英国企業が奴隷制度廃止後も、法の抜け穴を利用してブラジルで奴隷から利益を得ていた実態が明らかに。歴史家は英国の奴隷制度への関与が過小評価されていると指摘。

articles.title: Africa particularly vulnerable as Iran conflict disrupts supply chains, say experts
articles.description:
Food production in many African countries depends heavily on fertiliser imported from the Gulf through the strait of Hormuz
Countries in Africa, where farmers depend heavily on imported fertiliser and a large share of household income goes on food, are particularly vulnerable to supply chain disruptions caused by the war in the Middle East, experts have said.
The conflict has drastically disrupted trade through the strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping lane not just for oil and gas but also for fertiliser, which is produced in vast quantities in the Gulf.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: イラン紛争がサプライチェーンを混乱させ、アフリカが特に脆弱に、専門家が指摘
articles.summary: 中東紛争によるホルムズ海峡の貿易混乱で、肥料輸入に依存するアフリカ諸国はサプライチェーン途絶に特に脆弱。食料生産への深刻な影響が懸念されている。

articles.title: Nigeria’s online content creator market has boomed. Can the skit-makers and streamers make it pay?
articles.description:
As platforms make less from advertising, creators are struggling to monetise work – leading to calls for more government investment and tax breaks
On a humid afternoon in Lagos, a shoot for a comedy skit is under way on a set that looks more like a small film production.
Dozens of people mill about: lighting assistants, a sound engineer, a makeup artist and even a content creator recording unscripted behind-the-scenes footage. At the centre is Broda Shaggi, born Samuel Animashaun Perry, who is issuing instructions, rehearsing lines and performing caricatures.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ナイジェリアのオンラインコンテンツクリエイター市場が急成長。スキット制作者やストリーマーは収益を上げられるか？
articles.summary: ナイジェリアでオンラインコンテンツ作成市場が急成長するも、広告収入減少でクリエイターが収益化に苦戦。政府の投資や減税が求められている。

articles.title: Trump’s threats to ‘take’ Cuba signal rising US pressure as island grapples with power crisis
articles.description:
National power outage is making life extremely difficult and may force Havana into biggest economic reforms in 67 years
Just a few hours after a nationwide electricity blackout struck Cuba, Donald Trump hinted at an even darker future for the island’s rulers.
The country’s entire electricity system had collapsed on Monday afternoon, leaving about 10 million people without power. Emergency teams were still struggling to restore power when the US leader made his latest threat.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏のキューバ「奪取」の脅威、電力危機に苦しむ島への米国の圧力の高まりを示す
articles.summary: キューバで全国的な停電が発生する中、トランプ氏がキューバを「奪取」すると示唆。これは、米国からの圧力が高まり、キューバが抜本的な経済改革を迫られる可能性を示す。

articles.title: Colombian president accuses Ecuador after ‘27 charred bodies’ found near border
articles.description:
Relations deteriorate as Gustavo Petro claims government of Trump ally Daniel Noboa bombing targets in Colombia
President Gustavo Petro has accused Ecuador of bombing targets inside Colombian territory, saying later that the burned remains of nearly 30 people had been found near the border, in a sharp deterioration in relations between the two neighbouring countries.
The Colombian leader said on Tuesday that an attack which had left “27 charred bodies” did not appear to have been carried out by Colombia’s own forces or any illegal armed groups which he said do not have armed planes.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: コロンビア大統領、国境近くで「27体の焼死体」発見後、エクアドルを非難
articles.summary: コロンビア大統領が、国境近くで27体の焼死体が発見された後、エクアドルをコロンビア領内の爆撃で非難。両国間の関係が急速に悪化している。

articles.title: Man and woman charged with murder of Iranian activist in Canada
articles.description:
Charges follow discovery of body of Masood Masjoody, who was a critic of the Tehran regime and the exiled shah
Two people have been charged with the murder of an Iranian activist in Canada, in a case which has intensified fears over transnational repression of critics of the regime in Tehran.
Masood Masjoody, a former university maths teacher,  went missing in early February in the city of Burnaby, British Columbia. He had been critical of Iran’s theocratic regime and the exiled family of the former shah.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダでイラン人活動家殺害の容疑で男女を起訴
articles.summary: カナダでイラン人活動家殺害の容疑で男女2人が起訴された。この事件は、イラン政権の批判者に対する越境弾圧への懸念を強めている。

articles.title: Cuba’s electrical grid collapses amid US oil blockade
articles.description:
Ten million people left without power in latest of outages that sparked violent protest last weekend
Cuba’s national electric grid has collapsed, the country’s grid operator has said, leaving approximately 10 million people without power amid a US-imposed oil blockade that has crippled the island’s already obsolete generation system.
The grid operator, UNE, said on social media on Monday that it was investigating the causes of the blackout, the latest in a series of widespread outages that last for hours or days and that last weekend sparked a rare violent protest in the communist-run country.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: キューバの電力網が米国の石油封鎖の中で崩壊
articles.summary: キューバの全国電力網が崩壊し、約1000万人が停電に見舞われた。米国の石油禁輸措置と老朽化した発電システムが原因とされ、社会不安を引き起こしている。

articles.title: Cory Booker calls both parties ‘feckless’ for ceding war powers to Trump
articles.description:
Democrat says Congress ‘doing nothing’ may embolden president to attack countries such as Cuba and North Korea
Democratic US senator Cory Booker has criticized both his own political party as well as its Republican counterpart for being “feckless” in ceding congressional war powers to Donald Trump, saying that their decision could embolden the president to unilaterally attack Cuba, North Korea and other countries.
“I’m going to be one of those Democrats [who] say I think both parties have been feckless in allowing the growth of the power of the presidency,” Booker said on Sunday on CNN’s State of the Union.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: コリー・ブッカー、トランプ氏に戦争権限を譲渡したとして両党を「無能」と非難
articles.summary: 米民主党上院議員コリー・ブッカーが、トランプ大統領に戦争権限を譲渡したとして両党を「無能」と批判。キューバや北朝鮮への一方的攻撃の可能性を警告した。

articles.title: 'The biggest challenge’ and ‘opportunity’: Euronews Health Summit key takeaways
articles.description: Medicine shortages, European health sovereignty, the ethical lines of AI, and mental health dominated the conversation Euronews’ Health Summit in Brussels.
articles.titleJa: 「最大の課題」と「機会」：ユーロニュース保健サミットの主なポイント
articles.summary: 医薬品不足、欧州の医療主権、AI倫理、メンタルヘルスがユーロニュース保健サミットで議論の中心となった。

articles.title: Starmer says 'we can't lose focus' on Ukraine amid Iran war during Zelenskyy visit
articles.description: Zelenskyy's visit comes at a time when the Iran war has revived Russia’s ailing economy through increased oil revenue and scuttled US-brokered talks to end Russia’s invasion of Ukraine.
articles.titleJa: ゼレンスキー大統領訪問中、スターマー党首はイラン戦争の中「ウクライナへの集中を失うわけにはいかない」と発言
articles.summary: ゼレンスキー大統領訪問中、スターマー党首はイラン戦争がロシア経済を潤し、ウクライナ侵攻終結交渉を妨げている中で、ウクライナへの注力を維持するよう訴えた。

articles.title: Top US counter-terrorism official Joe Kent resigns in protest against Iran war
articles.description: As head of the National Counterterrorism Center, Kent was in charge of an agency tasked with analysing and detecting terrorist threats.
articles.titleJa: 米国の対テロ対策高官ジョー・ケント氏、イラン戦争に抗議して辞任
articles.summary: 米国国家対テロセンター長官のジョー・ケント氏が、イラン戦争への抗議を理由に辞任した。同氏はテロ脅威の分析・検出を担当していた。

articles.title: Kyiv open to discussing drone interception expertise with Netanyahu, Zelenskyy says
articles.description: Ukraine’s president said he is ready for a dialogue with the Israeli prime minister on drone interceptors and Kyiv’s expertise in countering Tehran's UAVs, as the Iran war entered its third week.
articles.titleJa: キーウ、ネタニヤフ首相とドローン迎撃に関する専門知識の協議に前向きとゼレンスキー大統領が表明
articles.summary: イラン戦争が3週目に入り、ゼレンスキー大統領は、イラン製UAV対策に関するウクライナの専門知識についてイスラエル首相との対話に前向きな姿勢を示した。

articles.title: European Parliament moves to revive the EU-US trade deal after months of gridlock
articles.description: MEPs moved Tuesday to revive the EU–US trade deal, scheduling a committee vote, but infighting between political groups keeps final approval by the full assembly uncertain with both March and April floated.

articles.title: Ukraine 'informally' opens all six clusters in EU membership bid but veto remains
articles.description: Brussels and Kyiv are trying to keep the process afloat by at least extending the technical talks while the Hungarian veto on Kyiv's membership remains in place.
articles.titleJa: ウクライナ、EU加盟申請で全6つの交渉分野を「非公式に」開始するも拒否権は残る
articles.summary: ウクライナはEU加盟申請で全6つの交渉分野を非公式に開始したが、ハンガリーの拒否権が残るため、技術協議を継続している。

articles.title: From museum-curated living to sustainable Alpine fine dining: The greatest European places in 2026
articles.description: A look at some of the most iconic European sights and hotels on TIME’s World’s Greatest Places 2026 list.
articles.titleJa: 美術館がキュレーションする生活から持続可能なアルプスの高級ダイニングまで：2026年の最も素晴らしいヨーロッパの場所
articles.summary: TIME誌の「2026年世界の最も素晴らしい場所」リストに掲載された、ヨーロッパの象徴的な観光スポットやホテルを紹介する。

articles.title: Macron says France could join Hormuz ship escorts once situation 'calmer'

articles.title: ’A reading group produces conversation, surprise, challenge, emotional commitment‘: Reading in the AI Era

articles.title: WTO launches applications for 2026 Young Trade Leaders Programme

articles.titleJa: WTOが2026年ヤング・トレード・リーダーズ・プログラムの申請受付を開始

articles.title: DDG Zhang welcomes 2026 cohorts of participants in two technical assistance programmes
articles.description: A ceremony held at the WTO headquarters on 12 March marked the launch of the 2026 edition of two WTO technical assistance programmes, the French Irish Mission Programme (FIMiP) and the Netherlands Talent Programme (NTP). Welcoming participants, Deputy Director-General Xiangchen Zhang highlighted the timeliness of these programmes, with the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference due to take place from 26 to 29 March in Yaoundé, Cameroon.
articles.titleJa: チャンWTO事務次長補が2026年技術支援プログラムの参加者を歓迎
articles.summary: WTO事務次長補チャン氏は、フランス・アイルランド・ミッション・プログラムとオランダ・タレント・プログラムの2026年版開始式で参加者を歓迎。これらのプログラムがカメルーンで開催される第14回WTO閣僚会議を前に重要性を増していると強調しました。

articles.title: Members review record SPS trade concerns; group weighs transparency challenges, solutions
articles.description: Meeting on 11-13 March, the Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary (SPS) Measures reviewed 76 SPS-related trade concerns raised by WTO members, a record for the committee. Earlier in the week, the Committee's Transparency Working Group met to consider possible improvements to notifications in order to facilitate tracking, disseminating and engaging on SPS requirements.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国が記録的なSPS貿易懸念を審査。透明性に関する課題と解決策を検討
articles.summary: WTOのSPS（衛生植物検疫）措置委員会が過去最多となる76件の貿易懸念を審査。透明性作業部会は通知改善策を検討し、SPS要件の追跡・周知・関与の円滑化を目指しています。

articles.title: Launch of third phase of EIF activities at MC14 high-level event
articles.description: A high-level event marking the launch of the Enhanced Integrated Framework’s (EIF) third phase of activities will take place on the margins of the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Yaoundé, Cameroon, on 25 March. The EIF’s work is dedicated to harnessing trade and investment for prosperity and sustainable economic growth in least-developed countries (LDCs).
articles.titleJa: 第14回閣僚会議（MC14）ハイレベルイベントでEIF活動第3フェーズが開始

articles.title: Russia notifies launch of safeguard investigation on tinplate
articles.description: On 11 March 2026, the Russian Federation notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards of the initiation on 4 March 2026 of a safeguard investigation on tinplate (certain flat-rolled products of iron or non-alloy steel) imported into the customs territory of the Eurasian Economic Union.
articles.titleJa: ロシアがブリキに関するセーフガード調査の開始を通知

articles.title: WTO chairpersons for 2026

articles.title: Director-General updates members on final preparations for "turning point" ministerial
articles.description: Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala updated members on final preparations for the WTO's upcoming 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Yaoundé, Cameroon, to take place on 26-29 March. She told a 10-12 March meeting of the General Council that she intends to send to ministers an informal "state-of-play" package next week with documents representing the current state of work in Geneva, as well as a final "Road to Yaoundé" document outlining how MC14 will be conducted.
articles.titleJa: 事務局長が「転換点」となる閣僚会議の最終準備状況を更新
articles.summary: 事務局長は、カメルーンのヤウンデで3月26〜29日に開催される第14回WTO閣僚会議の最終準備状況について加盟国に報告。ジュネーブでの作業状況を示す文書と、閣僚会議の運営方法を概説する最終文書を送付する意向を示しました。

articles.title: Uzbekistan commits to maintaining "strong momentum" to accede to WTO in 2026
articles.description: At a meeting of the Working Party on the Accession of Uzbekistan on 9 March, the head of Uzbekistan's delegation, Deputy Prime Minister Jamshid Khodjaev, said his country is committed to bringing Uzbekistan’s accession process to a successful conclusion this year. Thanking members for supporting Uzbekistan's accession during a very busy period, he reaffirmed the country's commitment to engage constructively with all Working Party members. Uzbekistan stands ready to address any remaining issues in a spirit of partnership and mutual understanding, he added.
articles.titleJa: ウズベキスタン、2026年のWTO加盟に向け「強い勢い」を維持することを約束
articles.summary: ウズベキスタンは、WTO加盟プロセスを本年中に成功裏に完了させることにコミットしていると表明。加盟作業部会のメンバーと建設的に協力し、残る問題に対処する用意があると強調しました。

articles.title: From field to factory, football and fashion: MC14 high-level event to spotlight cotton
articles.description: A high-level event on cotton will be held on the eve of the 14th Ministerial Conference in Yaoundé, Cameroon, on 25 March to highlight cotton’s importance to global trade and investment opportunities, particularly for Central and West African countries looking to move up the value chain. The event will feature the launch of the Partenariat pour le Coton Investment Platform, spotlighting of fashion and textile/garment entrepreneurs, and unveiling by FIFA representatives and Cameroon football legends of FIFA's tee-shirts and polo shirts to be distributed under the FIFA Football for Schools programme.
articles.titleJa: 畑から工場へ、サッカーとファッション：MC14ハイレベルイベントで綿花に焦点
articles.summary: 第14回閣僚会議前夜、カメルーンのヤウンデで綿花に関するハイレベルイベントが開催。中央・西アフリカ諸国の貿易・投資機会に焦点を当て、綿花のバリューチェーン向上を目指し、FIFAのサッカープログラムも紹介されます。

articles.title: The value of the WTO: An economics viewpoint in six instalments
articles.description: Why do economies negotiate trade agreements? If unilateral free trade can benefit an economy, why do governments devote so much effort to negotiating reciprocal tariff reductions and detailed trade rules with their partners? The answer lies in a fundamental feature of trade policy: when governments act independently, their policies affect not only their own economies but also the economies of others.
articles.titleJa: WTOの価値：経済学の視点から6回に分けて解説
articles.summary: 一方的な自由貿易が経済に利益をもたらすなら、なぜ各国政府は相互的な関税削減や詳細な貿易ルール交渉に尽力するのか。貿易政策の根源的な特徴から、WTOの価値を経済学の視点で解説します。
